title: V0: id + version
items: Wire create_versioning(0, ...) into node() when versioning provided
advance_version() on every DATA handled in local lifecycle
describe_node() includes { id, version } when V0 active
graph.snapshot() / describe path includes per-node v when versioning enabled
Graph.diff() uses version counters to skip unchanged nodes — O(changes)

title: V0 backfill (post-implementation)
items: Phase 5.4: gauges_as_context() delta by version; knobs_as_tools() include version — plus Appendix B / describe schema updates

title: V1: + cid + prev (content addressing, linked history)
items: V1: + cid + prev (content addressing, linked history)
